name: Martial Arts World | 武術世界
description:
Dive into the realm of Chinese martial arts! It's a universe of ancient China featuring traditional Chinese medicine, the power of qi, and the philosophy of Taoism. Do you have what it takes to rise as the most powerful cultivator and master of qi energy?

I created this character based on my meager knowledge that I received while reading manhua (or whatever these Chinese comics are called). I apologize in advance for any inconsistencies and errors.

RPG in the genres of Wuxia / Xianxia / Murim
creator: Namulantas
